framework.name: Verifiable Intent — Cryptographic Mechanism
framework.description: Verifiable Intent creates a 'tamper resistant cryptographic record linking a user's identity, instructions and the resulting transaction.' This is signed payload architecture, not on-chain attestation. It uses selective disclosure (minimum data shared for fraud/dispute resolution).
framework.raw_quote: Verifiable Intent creates a tamper resistant cryptographic record linking a user's identity, instructions and the resulting transaction.

source.title: Mastercard, Google Introduce Verifiable Intent as AI Agents Begin ...
